_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning to play and interact with other people for longer and longer periods.

_source.w: We are learning to play and interact with other people for longer and longer periods.
y: Spending time with others helps us build friendships.
Playing together for longer helps us learn patience and cooperation.
Longer interactions help us practise social skills.
eg: Playing a game with a partner for several minutes.
Working on a shared task together.
Having a conversation that goes back and forth.
Joining a group activity and staying for the whole time.
Playing alongside a friend without needing to leave.
Taking part in a longer cooperative activity.
